Q(O)end,function(M,U)local Q=h(U)local v=function(v,n,p)return z(M,{v,n;p},U,Q)end return v end,function(M,U)local Q=h(U)local v=function(v,n,p,E,O)return z(M,{v;n,p;E;O},U,Q)end return v end,function()P=(-65876-(-65877))+P r[P]=473564+-473563 return P end return(s(15468223-(190761+598603),{}))(Q(O))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[U(725198+-698497)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
